title: Friendly running, Fenland energy.
intro: Fenland Running Club helps and encourages adult runners of different abilities, with welcoming club nights, qualified support and a strong community spirit.
findYourPaceTitle: A club for different running journeys
findYourPaceIntro: Whether you are building confidence, returning to running, training for races or looking for a friendly group, Fenland Running Club is here to help you enjoy running.
trainingIntro: Club sessions usually start from Wisbech Rugby Club. Final times and session formats should be confirmed by the club before launch.
fenland10Intro: The club hosts the Fenland 10. Race date, venue, entry details and licence information need confirming before the page is promoted.
couchTo5kIntro: Fenland Running Club has a Couch to 5K programme. The next start date and sign-up route are TODO items for club confirmation.
